name: state_diff
description: Store a named state snapshot and return a unified diff vs. the previous snapshot. Designed for high-frequency status checks (e.g. ps, df, git status) to save tokens — only shows what changed. First call initializes the snapshot. Call with the same key to see what changed since the last call.

key.description: Short identifier for this state (e.g. 'ps', 'disk', 'git_status'). Must be a valid filename stem.

content.description: New state string to compare against the previous snapshot.
